features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Weighted Multi-Objective Drawdown Priorities
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Replaced fixed drawdown strategy enum with a 4-dimension continuous priority weighting system. Users adjust sliders for Tax Efficiency, IHT Reduction, Preserve Growth, and Liquidity. Weights auto-normalise to sum to 1.0. Preset buttons (Tax, IHT, Income, Growth) set common profiles. Custom blends supported.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Action Plan (Recommended Actions Timeline)
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Year-by-year timeline translating simulation outputs into plain-language recommended actions: what to sell/withdraw/draw, taxes due, gifts to make, and milestones. Key years mode filters to significant events (first/last year, milestones, draw-source changes, gifts, shortfalls, depletions). All years mode shows every year. Summary totals at bottom.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Cash Buffer / Minimum Cash Reserve
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Users set a minimum cash reserve amount. The engine enforces an aggregate cash floor across all cash-class assets during both income drawdowns and tax payment deductions. Cash assets are never drawn below the combined threshold.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Legacy Target (Bequest Protection)
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Users specify how much they want to leave in their will (net of IHT). The engine caps annual drawdowns when the portfolio approaches this threshold. Summary shows net estate after IHT, legacy shortfall amount, and met/unmet status.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: IHT Savings vs No-Plan Comparison
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Calculates a no-plan baseline IHT by growing all assets at their rates for the plan duration with no draws or gifts, then compares against the actual plan IHT at plan end. Shows the saving and baseline in the IHT summary card.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Asset Depletion Visibility
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: The Action Plan detects when any asset class transitions from a positive value to zero between consecutive years. Depletion events are displayed with an orange marker and automatically surface as key years in the filtered view.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: EIS IHT Optimisation (BPR-Aware Draw Scoring)
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: The drawdown priority scoring now factors in BPR qualification timing for IHT-exempt assets like EIS and AIM shares. Assets that have passed their 2-year BPR qualifying date receive the strongest protection from drawdown. Assets still in the qualifying window receive slightly less protection.
features_added_beyond_original_brief.engine_logic: scoreAssetForDrawdown() uses bprQualifyingDate to differentiate qualified vs pre-qualification BPR assets

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: BPR Cap Updated to £2.5M
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: Updated the BPR full relief cap from the originally implemented £1M to £2.5M combined BPR/APR allowance per taxpayer, reflecting the announced policy change. 100% relief up to £2.5M, 50% relief above. All UI text, warnings, and disclosures updated accordingly.

features_added_beyond_original_brief.name: Net Estate After IHT Display
features_added_beyond_original_brief.description: The Estate at Plan End summary card now shows the net estate value after deducting IHT — the amount beneficiaries would actually receive. Always visible regardless of whether a legacy target is set.

original_brief_features: 8 asset type simulation (cash, ISA, pension, property, VCT, EIS, AIM, residential property)
UK income tax with personal allowance taper
Capital gains tax with basic/higher rate split
PCLS / tax-free lump sum with lifetime allowance tracking
IHT calculation with nil-rate band and BPR relief
Gifting: PET, CLT (discretionary trust), NEFI types
CLT 7-year rolling window and PET taper relief
Scenario toggles (2026 BPR cap, 2027 pension IHT)
Portfolio value stacked area chart by asset class
IHT trajectory line chart with reference lines
Year detail table with expandable rows
Funded years indicator with shortfall detection
